mapper.select: select sum(APRIL_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as APRIL_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(APRIL_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as APRIL_MID_DAY, sum(APRIL_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as APRIL_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(MAY_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as MAY_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(MAY_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as MAY_MID_DAY, sum(MAY_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as MAY_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(JUNE_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as JUNE_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(JUNE_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as JUNE_MID_DAY, sum(JUNE_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as JUNE_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(JULY_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as JULY_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(JULY_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as JULY_MID_DAY, sum(JULY_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as JULY_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(JULY_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as JULY_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(JULY_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as JULY_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(AUGUST_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as AUGUST_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(AUGUST_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as AUGUST_MID_DAY, sum(AUGUST_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as AUGUST_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(SEPTEMBER_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as SEPTEMBER_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(SEPTEMBER_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as SEPTEMBER_MID_DAY, sum(SEPTEMBER_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as SEPTEMBER_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(OCTOBER_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as OCTOBER_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(OCTOBER_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as OCTOBER_MID_DAY, sum(OCTOBER_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as OCTOBER_LATER_OCTOBER, sum(NOVEMBER_EARLY_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as NOVEMBER_EARLY_OCTOBER, sum(NOVEMBER_MID_DAY_WATER_DEMAND) as NOVEMBER_MID_DAY, sum(NOVEMBER_LATER_OCTOBER_WATER_DEMAND) as NOVEMBER_LATER_OCTOBER from YEAR_WATER_USE_PLAN_CROP where YEAR = #{year} and area like concat('%',#{area},'%') and del = 0
select YEAR, AREA,UNIT,${month} as v,UNIT_ID,BIND_ID from tth.YEAR_WATER_USE_PLAN_TRUNK_CANAL where year = #{year}
